sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81826" key="periosfrai/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιοσφραίνομαι</orth>, <sense id="n81826.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sniff all round</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:311" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">311</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
